Pricing FAQ

Are these one-time or monthly prices? +
Our pricing is flexible. We offer both monthly subscriptions and lifetime license options. Contact our sales team to discuss the best model for your business size and budget.
Can I upgrade my plan later? +
Yes! You can upgrade from Basic to Premium or Enterprise at any time without losing any of your data. The transition is seamless and immediate.
Is there a setup fee? +
No setup fees whatsoever. You only pay for the plan you choose. Our team provides free initial configuration and onboarding support for all plans.
How many devices can I use per license? +
Basic and Premium plans are licensed per terminal (per Windows PC). Enterprise plans include unlimited terminal activations across all your locations.
Is there a free trial available? +
Yes! We offer a 14-day free trial on the Premium plan with all features fully enabled. No credit card required. Contact us to get started immediately.
What happens to my data if I cancel? +
Your data is always yours. Before cancellation, you can export a full backup of all your business data (sales, inventory, customers) in standard formats. We never hold your data hostage.
